channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-13
item.description:
66 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Most active:

metacheck23 commits
docpluck21 commits
coarse11 commits
regcheck11 commits

item.title: metacheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

Recent development activity for the GitHub repository 'scienceverse/metacheck' has focused on bug fixes, code refinement, and feature enhancements. Specifically, commits have addressed issues with validation, loops, and code checks, while also adding new features such as sanitizing steps and Zenodo repository support. The overall direction of development appears to be aimed at stabilizing and improving the functionality of the metacheck tool, with multiple contributors working to resolve bugs and enhance its capabilities. Additionally, there have been efforts to restructure internal functions and improve report validation, indicating a push towards greater robustness and reliability.

3 commit(s) today:

  • 9a007d9 TUE server uses 0.9.0 GROBID now as well — Lakens
  • 920c2d9 Add vignette describing all references — Lakens
  • 97bb1c1 stat_effect_size: detect tests via extract_eq(); add implied sample sizes (#308) — Lakens

item.title: docpluck: 1 commit today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

Recent development activity in the 'giladfeldman/docpluck' GitHub repository has focused on enhancing the rendering, table handling, and normalization capabilities of the project. Specifically, commits have introduced features such as funding split-role rendering, APA-Title-Case caption rules, and improvements to table completeness parity instrumentation. Additionally, numerous cycles of normalization have been implemented, addressing issues such as non-idempotent papers, text loss, and metadata leaks, with the goal of achieving idempotence across the corpus. Overall, the development direction is towards refining and expanding the project's text processing and rendering capabilities.

1 commit(s) today:
